original_text: Alphabet Inc. operates through three primary segments: Google Services, Google Cloud, and Other Bets, with a global presence spanning the United States, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia-Pacific, Canada, and Latin America. The Google Services segment generates revenue from advertising across Search, YouTube, and other properties, alongside non-advertising services including Google Play app sales, Fitbit wearable devices, Pixel phones, and Google Nest home products. Google Cloud provides infrastructure, platform services, and Google Workspace collaboration tools for enterprise customers, while Other Bets focuses on health technology and internet services. The company employs 185,719 full-time employees and is led by CEO Sundar Pichai.
revised_text: Alphabet Inc. operates through Google Services, Google Cloud, and Other Bets segments, with a global presence spanning the United States, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, the Asia-Pacific, Canada, and Latin America. The Google Services segment offers products and services including ads, Search, YouTube, hardware, and Google Play, and is involved in the sale of apps, in-app purchases, and digital content. The company employs 185,719 full-time employees and is led by CEO Sundar Pichai.
changes_summary: Removed unsupported claims regarding Google Cloud services (infrastructure, platform, Workspace) and Other Bets focus areas (health technology, internet services) as these details were not present in the evidence. Aligned Google Services description with C002 by using general terms like 'hardware' instead of specific product names (Fitbit, Pixel, Nest) not explicitly listed in the provided text. Retained supported information on operating segments, geographic presence, employee count, and CEO from C001 and C002.
